title: Henbrandt 12 x Children’s Puzzle Watches 4 Assorted Colours Ball Maze Game Fake Watch Toys Kids Party Favour Loot Bag Filler Lucky Dip for Boys and Girls
features: Pack of 12 Puzzle Watches for children.
The kids’ puzzle watches are great party favours, lucky dip prizes and loot bag fillers.
Available in four colours – Blue, Green, Orange and Purple. Colours are subject to availability and will be sent at random.
description: These puzzle watches make great party bag favours, loot bag fillers, lucky dip rewards, piñata prizes, and children’s classroom rewards. The puzzle watch toys are approximately 18.3cm long and can be adjusted to fit a variety of wrist sentences. The toys come in 4 assorted colours, including: Blue, Green, Orange and Purple. Each plastic watch has one of four assorted background designs inside the watch face and two mini metal plastic contained within. To play the game, you must manoeuvre the mini metal balls into the spaces in the background image and hold them all there simultaneously. Pack of 12 puzzle watches per order. Please be advised this product contains small pieces and is recommended for ages 3+. These party items have been thoroughly tested to EN71 and REACH regulations and are compliant with all applicable UK and EU safety requirements.
